purpose: Accumulated workflow and architecture learnings for digitizing board games (Regicide-style: authoritative Node back, Flutter client). Append findings on code-building strategies and optimal prompts over time.

sources.summary: Solo + multiplayer table UX iteration; Flutter perspective table below expectations; opponent seat cards; discard/app bar fixes

backend.role: rules + authoritative board state + realtime sync

frontend.role: render board state + send player intents

reuse.description: Patterns worth keeping or polishing with low effort on the next game

backend.pattern: Clients send intents only; server validates and emits views
Machine-readable rules JSON + TS engine module per game
REST for room lifecycle; Socket.IO for in-game
Per-player view: public state + private hand; never broadcast full hands
Short room code + persisted playerId; ?room= deep link
Room idle cleanup, reconnect banner, API/socket error code mapping

frontend.pattern: domain / data / presentation; DTO to entity
BLoC per screen (home, lobby, game); widgets stay dumb
PROJECT_BRIEF, STATUS, ROADMAP, phase docs, CHANGELOG per increment

process.pattern: Solo playtest first; then isolated Chrome profiles script with cache bust

improve.description: Medium effort, high payoff before or during game #2

items.finding: Avoid magic numbers in Dart (rail T, trapezoid fractions); use layout JSON or server anchors
items.recommendation: table_layout.json with seatId to normalized x,y,w,h; UI positions chips over background

items.finding: Client re-derived affordances (e.g. canDiscard) caused UI bugs; app bar clipped actions
items.recommendation: stateVersion on snapshots; server sends legalActions[]; primary actions beside affected widgets

items.finding: Hand-written DTOs in TS and Dart drift
items.recommendation: JSON Schema or OpenAPI; codegen Dart + TypeScript types

items.finding: Engine tests exist but should scale with rules file
items.recommendation: Test cases embedded in or generated from rules JSON

items.finding: Polish table before engine stable wasted iteration
items.recommendation: Tier 1: panels/lists/chips until playtest passes; Tier 2: asset skin sprint

items.finding: flutter run web cache and profile staleness hid stale builds
items.recommendation: Weekly flutter build web; script cache bust for local MP

alternatives.description: Different approaches when pure Flutter widget board drawing underwhelms
alternatives.regicidePainPoint: Custom trapezoid CustomPaint, rail positioning, app bar layout fights; high tweak cost, fragile on web

options.name: Asset-first board (Flutter Stack)
options.approach: Background PNG/SVG + Positioned chips; layout from JSON percents

options.name: HTML/CSS board in Flutter web
options.approach: Flutter shell; HtmlElementView or iframe board; postMessage or shared socket

options.name: Flame 2D layer + Flutter HUD
options.approach: Flame for board; Material for hand and chrome

options.name: Panel/chip UI only (no table illustration)
options.approach: Enemy panel, fight stats, opponent chips, hand row

options.name: Godot/Phaser board + Node authority
options.approach: Strict state sync contract; renderer is view-only

targetArchitectureGame2.description: Suggested repo shape for next board-game digitization

dayOneContracts.name: PublicBoardState
dayOneContracts.rule: All information visible to opponents and spectators; no hidden fields

dayOneContracts.name: legalActions
dayOneContracts.rule: Server lists affordances; client does not re-derive rule engine for button visibility

codeBuildingStrategies.description: Actionable dev practices; append new entries with id, date, tags

entries.strategy: Place primary phase actions next to the objects they affect (hand, zone), not only in app bar
entries.evidence: Discard button clipped in 72px app bar during step 4 MP test

entries.strategy: PreferredSizeWidget toolbarHeight in build() must equal preferredSize when content grows
entries.evidence: Turn message disappeared when preferredSize 108 but toolbarHeight 72

entries.strategy: Avoid Unicode em-dash and <PLACEHOLDER> in .ps1; use ROOMCODE not <CODE>
entries.evidence: run-multiplayer-chrome.ps1 parse errors on Windows PS 5.1

entries.strategy: Clear profile cache + cb query param + --disable-cache when opening test browsers
entries.evidence: Stale Flutter web build in isolated Chrome profiles

entries.strategy: Isolate table/board visuals in one folder; GamePage imports single entry widget

promptPatterns.description: Prompt templates and notes that worked or failed; append with id, date, outcome

entries.template: Read PROJECT_BRIEF.md + STATUS.md + relevant ROADMAP slice before coding; implement only next unchecked item unless user redirects
entries.notes: Documented in PROJECT_BRIEF How to use

entries.template: For table look changes: edit only front/lib/presentation/game/table/ and app_colors; see PHASE5_TABLE.md file map
After increment: update STATUS.md, check ROADMAP.md, add CHANGELOG.md entry if notable

antiPatterns.description: Building perspective table and rail math before solo/MP rules path verified

futureEntries.instructions: Append to codeBuildingStrategies.entries, promptPatterns.entries, improve.items, or sources[] with unique id and ISO date. Bump lastUpdated. Do not remove schemaVersion without migration note.
